title: CAPAS — Claim Admissibility Engine (open-core reference implementation)
description: Deterministic claim-admissibility engine: a claim + its structured evidence goes in, ACCEPT/REWRITE/REJECT/HOLD comes out. CAPAS does not determine truth; it decides whether the supplied evidence LICENSES the claim, re-derivably, with no language model in the verdict. Includes the admissibility calculus, deterministic gates across 10 domains, the pharma statistical-admissibility corpus (3,024 cases), the quantum-advantage commitment gate, and a self-runnable conformance harness with a deterministic result hash.
